valid.name: CREATE_BEGIN session spec and pending visibility
INPUT_ORPHAN_DISCARD resolves an orphaned exact generation
ORPHAN_DISCARDED names the prior orphan owner and host age
ORPHAN_DISCARDED types a held human preemption

value.diagnostic: held human claim preempted for delivery

valid.name: frozen neutral resize receipt reports the post-set readback
frozen neutral attach request negotiates protocol and checkpoints
frozen neutral attach result resumes at a host-reported cursor
frozen neutral attach result reports an out-of-retention gap
frozen neutral attach cursor may bind no applied checkpoint
session inspection preserves unknown input observation

invalid.name: terminal attempt requires one receipt form
status update requires stable request id
HELLO rejects daemon without control identity
HELLO rejects daemon block from viewer
HostRecordV1 rejects an absolute socket path
INPUT_ORPHAN_DISCARD rejects an untyped resolution mode
ORPHAN_DISCARDED rejects a missing typed state
ERROR rejects an unknown typed code
frozen create request rejects Hive policy
frozen create result rejects collapsed launch failure
frozen resize request rejects a non-monotonic revision encoding
frozen resize receipt cannot claim the application handled it
frozen attach request rejects a reversed negotiation minor range
frozen attach result cannot claim it resumed inside a sequence
APPLIED output acknowledgement rejects non-decimal high-water
